creator: vincepoy@gmail.com
text:
ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96 which is the nVidia video card driver required for older nVidia video cards fails to build in 8.0-RELEASE/9.0-CURRENT.  There appears to be a newer version of the drivers according to http://www.nvidia.com/object/unix.html

The ftp site contains 96.43.16 as well:
download.nvidia.com/freebsd/96.43.16

This is what happens when trying to build the package:

root@bigbang [10:56am][/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96] >> make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for nvidia-driver-195.22
===>  Extracting for nvidia-driver-96.43.13
=> MD5 Checksum OK for NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-96.43.13.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-96.43.13.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for nvidia-driver-96.43.13
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for nvidia-driver-96.43.13
===>   nvidia-driver-96.43.13 depends on shared library: m.3 - found
===>   nvidia-driver-96.43.13 depends on shared library: GL.1 - found
===>  Configuring for nvidia-driver-96.43.13
===>  Building for nvidia-driver-96.43.13
===> src (all)
@ -> /usr/src/sys
machine -> /usr/src/sys/i386/include
awk -f @/tools/makeobjops.awk @/kern/device_if.m -h
awk -f @/tools/makeobjops.awk @/kern/bus_if.m -h
awk -f @/tools/makeobjops.awk @/dev/pci/pci_if.m -h
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -p
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -q
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -h
cc -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DNV_VERSION_STRING=\"96.43.13\" -D__KERNEL__ -DNVRM -UDEBUG -U_DEBUG -DNDEBUG -O -Werror -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -nostdinc  -I/src -I. -I@ -I@/contrib/altq -finline-limit=8000 --param inline-unit-growth=100 --param large-function-growth=1000 -fno-common  -mno-align-long-strings -mpreferred-stack-boundary=2  -mno-mmx -mno-3dnow -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mno-sse3 -ffreestanding -fstack-protector -std=iso9899:1999 -fstack-protector -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes  -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual  -Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -fformat-extensions -c nvidia_ctl.c
cc -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DNV_VERSION_STRING=\"96.43.13\" -D__KERNEL__ -DNVRM -UDEBUG -U_DEBUG -DNDEBUG -O -Werror -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -nostdinc  -I/src -I. -I@ -I@/contrib/altq -finline-limit=8000 --param inline-unit-growth=100 --param large-function-growth=1000 -fno-common  -mno-align-long-strings -mpreferred-stack-boundary=2  -mno-mmx -mno-3dnow -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mno-sse3 -ffreestanding -fstack-protector -std=iso9899:1999 -fstack-protector -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes  -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual  -Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -fformat-extensions -c nvidia_dev.c
nvidia_dev.c:138: error: conflicting types for 'nvidia_dev_mmap'
nvidia_dev.c:20: error: previous declaration of 'nvidia_dev_mmap' was here
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96/work/NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-96.43.13/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96/work/NVIDIA-FreeBSD-x86-96.43.13.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96.

How-To-Repeat: make in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96
